creator: reig.simeo@gmail.com
text:
Yes, I'm going to port wildfly14 this week but they are different ports: Wildfly version N+1 does not make obsolete version N. Wildfly 14 is the first one that is Java EE8 Certified (that is retro compatible with javaEE7), but many companies (like our) will not move to java EE8 on production until some months pass therefore It's a must to have a port for wildfly13 

Simeó
